creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Without numbering, and with each section prefixed by the title of the chapter, redundancy and overlap become easier to see. Alphabetical order: 

Writing style acronyms
Writing style guidelines
Writing style linting with Vale 
Writing style one sentence per line
Writing style special character list
Writing style style guide
Writing style tips


Rewind to February 2021, it seems to me that the writing style style guide was mostly about _code and committing_ (not about the traditional process of writing): 

<https://docs-archive.freebsd.org/doc/13.0-RELEASE/usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/writing-style-guide.html>

(The first of the two acronym-related paragraphs at <https://docs-archive.freebsd.org/doc/13.0-RELEASE/usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/writing-style-guide.html#writing-style-acronyms> was not code-related.)

First thought on reorganisation of sections: 

    Text content
      Balance
      White space
      Other guidelines

    Image content
      …

    Coding and committing your content
      Semantic line breaks
      Vale

The table of special characters should probably move to … <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/asciidoctor-primer/>.
